subject: fix(content): prevent toolbar click-race with delayed blur
body:
The focused-toolbar optimization (show toolbar only when textarea focused)
introduced a race condition: onBlur fires before toolbar onClick, unmounting
the toolbar before the click event reaches the button. Fixed by delaying
blur state change by 150ms, giving the click handler time to fire.

Tags: text, freeform, ux, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
